data.title: Ethereum draining malware disguised as trading bots exposed
data.description:
SentinelLABS reported cryptocurrency scams using fake trading bots to drain Ethereum and other coins. The scammers reportedly use old YouTube accounts and strategically placed comments to create a false perception of legitimacy to target crypto traders through social media and video content distribution. The threat actors advertise fake crypto trading bots through YouTube videos targeting […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-drainer-trading-bots-steal-crypto/

data.title: MemeFi price surge at risk amid looming Binance delisting
data.description:
MemeFi surged 300% after Binance’s futures delisting news. A major short squeeze after Binance’s announcement triggered high trading volume and volatility. Binance delisting raises doubts about the rally’s sustainability
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/memefi-price-surge-at-risk-amid-looming-binance-delisting/

data.title: Trader Faces Losses After U.S. Presidential Order Impacts Market
data.description:
According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a trader known as @qwatio incurred significant losses following a market surge triggered by an executive order signed by U.S. President Donald Trump. The trader closed all short positions on Bitcoin at a centralized exchange (CEX), resulting in a loss of $2.51 million.

Subsequently, the trader transferred the remaining $475,000 from the CEX to GMX to short Ethereum (ETH). The short position was opened at an average price of $3,809, with a nominal value of $26.36 million and a liquidation price set at $3,854.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming Secures $200 Million in Funding to Boost Ethereum Reserves
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, SharpLink Gaming has announced a successful $200 million funding round through a private placement. The shares were issued at a price of $19.50 each, with four global institutional investors leading the investment.

The funds raised will be allocated to expanding the company's Ethereum (ETH) reserves. Once fully deployed, SharpLink Gaming's Ethereum assets are expected to exceed $2 billion.

data.title: Trump to sign executive order today: $12 trillion in retirement funds can be invested in Bitcoin
data.description:
President Donald Trump is scheduled to sign an executive order on Thursday, August 7, allowing 401(k) retirement plans to include private equity, real estate, and cryptocurrencies, among other similar assets. The order will instruct the U.S. Department of Labor to review and possibly revise the existing guidelines on the inclusion of alternative investments in retirement plans governed by the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974 (ERISA), as reported by Bloomberg
source: https://finbold.com/trump-to-sign-executive-order-today-12-trillion-in-retirement-funds-can-be-invested-in-bitcoin/

data.title: Trump Affirms Respect for Federal Reserve, No Plans to Dismiss Powell
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed his respect for the Federal Reserve and confirmed that he has no intention of dismissing its Chairman, Jerome Powell. This statement was made by U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent, highlighting Trump's regard for the institution.

data.title: HashiCorp Vault Vulnerabilities Pose Security Risks in Cryptocurrency Sector
data.description: According to PANews, recent reports from Cyata have revealed multiple zero-day vulnerabilities in HashiCorp Vault, a widely used tool for wallet and key management in the cryptocurrency industry. These vulnerabilities affect critical areas such as authentication, identification, and authorization. Some of these flaws can bypass lock and multi-factor authentication protections, potentially allowing attackers to execute remote code, posing a significant threat to infrastructure security. The Cyata team has collaborated with HashiCorp to address these issues. 23pds, the Chief Information Security Officer at SlowMist Technology, advises relevant organizations to promptly upgrade to the latest version to mitigate potential risks.

data.title: U.S. Treasury's AI Initiatives and Trade Agreement Developments
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent announced that Paras Malik is leading the Department of the Treasury's efforts related to artificial intelligence. Besent also stated that a trade agreement has been largely finalized, with the potential for tariff revenues to exceed $300 billion by 2026.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Comments on Trade Landscape
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent stated that the current situation does not represent the largest reshaping of trade patterns since 1935. Previous regulatory policies have compelled the relocation of manufacturing overseas.
